_golden_master.backs: accounting_regime invariant (CLAUDE.md §5, design §3). Proves the vendor serves BOTH bases per period, so the regime state SELECTS a basis — no restatement needed.
_golden_master.expected_behavior: FY2024 (period 202412) is in the ias29_2023_2024 regime. The IAS-29 inflation-adjusted revenue (2,109,310M TRY) and the unadjusted revenue (1,611,489M TRY) differ by ~30.9%. The invariant test must REFUSE any growth/intensity/materiality calc that mixes an adjusted figure with an unadjusted one, or that straddles the FY2023 (nominal->IAS29) or FY2025 (IAS29->suspended) switch without converting to a common basis.
